cost_components.name: LLM API Tokens (Cloud)
cost_components.notes: Range from Gemini 2.0 Flash ($0.10/M input) to OpenAI o3 ($600/M output). Typical balanced usage with Claude 3.5 Sonnet or GPT-4o costs ~$0.003-0.015/1K tokens. Platform routes via LiteLLM across 18 chat providers. Local Ollama models (qwen2.5:3b, deepseek-r1:8b, llama3.2:3b) have $0 token cost.

cost_components.name: LLM API Tokens (Local/Ollama)
cost_components.notes: Ollama, LM Studio, and other local providers have zero per-token cost. Electricity cost is negligible (~$0.01-0.05/hr for CPU inference). The router catalogues 3 local models (qwen2.5:3b at 1.9GB, deepseek-r1:8b at 4.7GB, llama3.2:3b at 2.2GB) with auto-detection.

cost_components.name: Compute (Docker/Self-Hosted)
cost_components.notes: Self-hosted on user hardware: $0. VPS hosting (4 vCPU, 8GB RAM suitable for the platform + small local models): $20-40/mo on Hetzner/OVH, $40-80/mo on AWS/GCP. GPU instance for larger local models: $50-200/mo. Platform targets 'modest hardware' with P95 backend ready <= 45s.

cost_components.name: Storage (SQLite Databases)
cost_components.notes: 36 instruments each with dedicated SQLite .db files, plus llm_router.db for usage tracking and events.db per instrument. All use WAL mode for concurrency. Typical total footprint: 50MB-2GB. On self-hosted hardware: $0. On cloud block storage: $0.50-5.00/mo.

cost_components.name: Integration APIs (Stripe)
cost_components.notes: Stripe charges 2.9% + $0.30 per transaction. This is a pass-through cost borne by the platform operator for payment processing. The stripe_payments instrument manages customers, products, invoices, and subscriptions with full lifecycle sync.

cost_components.name: Integration APIs (Twilio Voice)
cost_components.notes: Twilio voice calls: ~$0.013-0.022/min outbound (US). The twilio_voice instrument uses TwiML for call scripting. Pass-through cost using operator's own Twilio credentials (BYOK pattern).

cost_components.name: Integration APIs (SMS via Google Voice)
cost_components.notes: Google Voice SMS is free (included with Google Voice account). The google_voice instrument uses browser automation (Playwright session) to send/receive SMS with dedup via SHA-256 hashing. No per-message API cost.

cost_components.name: Infrastructure (Domain, SSL, DNS)
cost_components.notes: Domain registration: ~$10-15/yr. SSL via Let's Encrypt: free. DNS: free-$5/mo. Amortized monthly: $1-5.

cost_components.name: Support and Maintenance
cost_components.notes: Community support (GitHub issues, Discord): $0. Professional support with SLA: estimated $50-200/mo per customer depending on tier. Documentation and community maintenance is an operational cost spread across all users.

tiers.name: Community (Free)
tiers.tagline: Full-power self-hosted AI orchestration, no strings attached
includes: LLM Router with 18 chat providers + 9 embedding providers
Bring Your Own Keys (BYOK) for all cloud LLM providers
Unlimited local model usage via Ollama/LM Studio
Full Web UI with task scheduler and dashboards
Stripe, Twilio, Google Voice integrations (BYOK credentials)
tiers.cost_basis: Zero marginal cost to us. User self-hosts on their own hardware and provides their own API keys. All LLM, Twilio, Stripe costs are pass-through to the user's own accounts. Our cost is only open-source maintenance, amortized across the community. This is the genuine open-core model: the full product is free and usable.

tiers.name: Free Cloud
tiers.tagline: Hosted trial with a real token budget — no install, no keys, no credit card
includes: Fully managed cloud deployment (no Docker, no server)
$2/mo included cloud token budget (Claude Haiku, Gemini Flash, GPT-4o Mini)
Full Web UI — chat, task scheduler, dashboards
All 36 instruments available (read-only in sensitive areas)
30-day trial of one Solution Package of your choice
One-click upgrade to Pro when ready
tiers.cost_basis: We absorb ~$2 in token costs per active free user. Hosting a lightweight instance costs ~$1-2/mo on shared infrastructure. Total COGS ~$3-4/active user. Conversion target: 15-20% to Pro within 30 days. Break-even at ~$0.60 CAC per converted user assuming 15% conversion.

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.tagline: Managed routing, usage insights, and priority support for serious operators
includes: Managed LLM proxy with $10/mo included cloud token budget (via Agent Jumbo Venice.ai endpoint)
Usage analytics dashboard with per-project cost tracking
Priority model routing with automatic fallback chains
Prompt caching optimization (supported on Anthropic, OpenAI models)
Pre-built workflow templates and agent configurations
Early access to new instruments and features
Automatic backup scheduling for SQLite databases
tiers.cost_basis: The $10 included token budget costs us ~$8-10 at wholesale rates (we route through our Venice.ai proxy at near-cost). Support cost ~$5-8/customer/mo amortized. Infrastructure for proxy/analytics: ~$3-5/customer/mo. Total COGS ~$16-23, yielding 41-59% gross margin at $39. Priced below Dify Pro ($59) and n8n Cloud Pro ($50) while including LLM tokens that competitors charge separately.

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.tagline: Multi-business orchestration with premium support and governance controls
includes: Advanced governance: routing rules, cost caps, model allowlists per project
Batch API support for high-volume background processing
tiers.cost_basis: Token budget costs ~$40-45 at wholesale. Support at higher SLA: ~$20-30/customer/mo. Multi-instance infrastructure overhead: ~$10-15/mo. Total COGS ~$70-90, yielding 40-53% gross margin at $149. Positioned well below custom-priced enterprise tiers from CrewAI and LangChain while providing concrete multi-business value.

tiers.name: Enterprise Custom
tiers.tagline: Custom deployments, dedicated support, and white-label options -- contact us
includes: Custom token budget and volume pricing
tiers.cost_basis: Contact sales. Pricing based on deployment scale, token volume, and support requirements. Minimum expected: $500/mo. Targeted at agencies and MSPs operating 10+ business instances.

competitive_reference.comparison_notes: Dify Pro at $59/mo includes 5,000 message credits but requires separate LLM API keys. Agent Jumbo Pro at $39 includes $10 token budget routed through our proxy AND supports unlimited local model usage. Dify is cloud-hosted; Agent Jumbo is self-hosted with optional managed routing.

n8n Cloud Pro at $50/mo focuses on workflow automation with 2,500 executions. Agent Jumbo is purpose-built for AI agent orchestration with 36 specialized instruments, LLM routing across 18 providers, and full lifecycle management. n8n has broader integration ecosystem (500+ nodes) but no native LLM routing or agent loop management.

CrewAI Enterprise is custom-priced (typically $200+/mo). Their open-source framework requires significant custom integration. Agent Jumbo provides a complete operational platform (Web UI, task scheduler, dashboards, payment processing, communication instruments) out of the box at $0 for self-hosted.

LangGraph Cloud is usage-based pricing (no fixed monthly). Their Developer tier is free with limited runs. Agent Jumbo's self-hosted model means zero platform fees for local usage. LangGraph excels at durable execution and human-in-the-loop; Agent Jumbo excels at full lifecycle orchestration with integrated business instruments.

OpenHands is focused purely on AI software engineering (coding agent). Agent Jumbo covers the full AI Architect lifecycle: design, build, test, validate, deploy, plus business operations (CRM, payments, communications). Different scope but overlapping in the coding-agent vertical.

assumptions: All pricing assumes self-hosted deployment where the operator provides their own compute hardware or VPS.

LLM token costs are based on published pricing as of March 2026: OpenAI GPT-4o at $5/$15 per million tokens, Anthropic Claude 3.5 Sonnet at $3/$15, Gemini 2.0 Flash at $0.10/$0.40, local Ollama models at $0.
The 'typical small business' usage profile is estimated at 500K-2M tokens/month across chat, code generation, and background tasks, costing $2-15/month in cloud LLM fees depending on model mix.
Stripe transaction fees (2.9% + $0.30) and Twilio per-minute charges are always pass-through costs borne by the operator regardless of tier.
The managed LLM proxy (Agent Jumbo Venice.ai endpoint) operates at near-cost with a 15-20% markup on wholesale token prices to cover routing infrastructure.

Support cost estimates assume a lean team: community support is volunteer/maintainer time, Pro email support is ~15 min/ticket average, Enterprise priority support is ~30 min/ticket with dedicated rotation.
36 instruments confirmed in codebase, each with independent SQLite database. Total storage footprint for a typical installation: 50MB-2GB.
Enterprise multi-instance pricing assumes shared infrastructure for proxy/analytics with per-instance marginal cost of ~$2-3/mo.
GPU costs for local model inference are excluded from tier pricing since they are operator hardware decisions, not platform costs.
Competitor pricing sourced from public pricing pages and GitHub documentation as of March 2026; actual enterprise pricing may vary.
